steps.name: I should be redirected to dashboard
user is redirected to gestion cantine page
When user adds a new meal with Nom du repas "Pizza Margherita", Categorie "Dîner", Emoji "🍕", Date "", Description "Nouvelle description pour le repas", Prix "10", Quantité "12"
And user modifies the meal "Pizza Margherita" to new name "Pizza Modifiée"
And user deletes the meal name "Pizza Modifiée"
Then the meal should not exist anymore
